cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements for Java 21 compatibility.
Replace javax.* imports with jakarta.* equivalents to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 21.
Migrate from the deprecated EmbeddedEngine API to the new DebeziumEngine API required for modern Debezium versions.
Remove direct dependency on PostgresConnector class as configuration is now externalized via properties.
Remove direct dependency on MemoryOffsetBackingStore as offset storage is now configured via properties.
Externalize Debezium configuration from hardcoded Java code to Quarkus application properties using MicroProfile Config.

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Replace CDI ManagedExecutorService with standard Java ExecutorService to simplify dependency and lifecycle management.
Update engine shutdown logic to use the close() method of DebeziumEngine instead of stop().
Adapt the event handling callback to match the new DebeziumEngine batch processing interface.

Migrate annotation imports from javax.annotation and javax.enterprise.context to jakarta.annotation and jakarta.enterprise.context to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Java versions.
Fix inconsistent indentation in the Infinispan configuration builder chain to align with standard coding style.
Migrate CDI import from javax.enterprise to jakarta.enterprise to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Quarkus versions.
Replace deprecated setFlushMode with setHibernateFlushMode to align with newer Hibernate ORM API changes.
Remove the serialVersionUID field as the class does not implement Serializable and the field is unused.
Clean up unnecessary extra whitespace in the method declaration.
Replace deprecated javax.* imports with jakarta.* equivalents to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Quarkus/JDK versions.
Replace javax.* imports with jakarta.* equivalents to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements for modern Java versions.
Replace javax.* imports with jakarta.* equivalents to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in newer Java versions.
Migrate JAX-RS imports from the legacy javax.ws.rs package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.ws.rs package to ensure compatibility with modern Java versions and servers.
